dialogue_text: Lay your hands upon the shoulder of John Carter,
source_excerpt: "Lay your hands upon the shoulder of John Carter," she said to them, turning toward me, "the man to whom Helium owes her princess as well as her victory today."

speaker.notes: Attributed through a role label rather than a canonical name.

dialogue_text: the man to whom Helium owes her princess as well as her victory today.

dialogue_text: You owe your thanks more to another man than to me,
source_excerpt: "You owe your thanks more to another man than to me," I said, "and here he is; meet one of Barsoom's greatest soldiers and statesmen, Tars Tarkas, Jeddak of Thark."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
